message:
fix(gpu): rename WGSL reserved keyword 'smooth' to 'smoothed'

- Fixed metaballs GPU shader compilation error on newer wgpu versions
- WGSL added 'smooth' as a reserved keyword for smoothstep
- Renamed variable at gpu_metaballs.wgsl:100
- All 26 metaballs tests pass

Also:
- Fixed mermaid_fixtures.rs: added missing #[cfg(feature = "diagram")] gate
- Updated beads: closed bd-1a657

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
